tasks.instruction: Przeczytaj ponizszy tekst. Uzupelnij kazda luke (1.1-1.8), przeksztalcajac wyraz podany w ramce w taka forme, ktora logicznie i gramatycznie pasuje do kontekstu. Wymagana jest calkowita poprawnosc gramatyczna i ortograficzna wpisywanych wyrazow. Dwa wyrazy zostaly podane dodatkowo i nie pasuja do zadnej luki.
tasks.text: Throughout history, certain artists have achieved 1.1. _________ (1.1) status, their names recognised across generations. The 1.2. _________ (1.2) of a masterpiece can vary greatly depending on the viewer's cultural background and personal 1.3. _________ (1.3). Attending a live concert by a world-class pianist can be a truly 1.4. _________ (1.4) experience that leaves the audience speechless. Some works of modern art have sparked 1.5. _________ (1.5) debates about what truly constitutes artistic merit. 1.6. _________ (1.6) musicians are easily recognised by their 1.7. _________ (1.7) technique and emotional depth. True 1.8. _________ (1.8) of art requires years of study and an open mind.
